implementation.verification_output: tsc --noEmit completed with no errors. BemVindo.tsx created with complete 6-step onboarding page, custom stepper, localStorage integration, dark mode support, and all required content.

improvements_made: Created complete onboarding page with 6 steps (Boas-vindas, Setores, Demandas, Colaboradores, Gerar Escala, Pronto)
Implemented custom stepper with 3 visual states (complete/active/pending) using Check icon, numbered circles, connecting lines
All content in Portuguese as specified, non-technical language for end users
Used PageHeader component following existing pattern
Step icons match specification (Sparkles, Building2, Clock, Users, Calendar, CheckCircle2)
Navigation buttons with proper states (Anterior disabled at step 0, Proximo only shown for steps 0-4, Comecar shown at step 5)
localStorage integration for flag 'escalaflow-onboarding-v1' on finish/skip

Responsive design: stepper labels hidden on mobile (hidden sm:block), max-w-3xl container works with sidebar open/collapsed
Animation: key={currentStep} with animate-in fade-in duration-300 for smooth transitions
All step content matches PRD specification exactly
Visual examples using Badge components for setores, demandas, contracts
Flow visualization for step 4 (Gerar → Ajustar → Oficializar) with numbered circles
